mapper.select: SELECT MOVIE_ID, TITLE, ORIGINAL_TITLE, DIRECTOR, ACTORS, GENRE, RELEASE_DATE, RUNNING_TIME, RATING, DESCRIPTION, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT FROM MOVIE ORDER BY MOVIE_ID DESC
SELECT MOVIE_ID, TITLE, ORIGINAL_TITLE, DIRECTOR, ACTORS, GENRE, RELEASE_DATE, RUNNING_TIME, RATING, DESCRIPTION, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT FROM MOVIE WHERE MOVIE_ID = #{movieId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MOVIE ( MOVIE_ID, TITLE, ORIGINAL_TITLE, DIRECTOR, ACTORS, GENRE, RELEASE_DATE, RUNNING_TIME, RATING, DESCRIPTION, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( SEQ_MOVIE.NEXTVAL, #{title}, #{originalTitle}, #{director}, #{actors}, #{genre}, #{releaseDate}, #{runningTime}, #{rating}, #{description}, SYSDATE )
mapper.update: UPDATE MOVIE SET TITLE = #{title}, ORIGINAL_TITLE = #{originalTitle}, DIRECTOR = #{director}, ACTORS = #{actors}, GENRE = #{genre}, RELEASE_DATE = #{releaseDate}, RUNNING_TIME = #{runningTime}, RATING = #{rating}, DESCRIPTION = #{description}, UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE MOVIE_ID = #{movieId}
